$comment: Module manifest — the contract between this module and the Jarvis core (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns). Status 'planned': structurally valid scaffold for a future capability. Wellbeing context — supportive, non-clinical, with crisis-escalation guardrails.
name: MindHaven Assistant
description: A supportive, reflective journaling companion for everyday wellbeing. Non-clinical: it does not diagnose or treat, and it escalates crisis indicators to professional resources.

envVars.name: MINDHAVEN_ASSISTANT_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflow.

envVars.name: MINDHAVEN_CRISIS_RESOURCES
envVars.default: If you are in immediate danger call your local emergency number. UK: Samaritans 116 123. US: 988. Or contact a local crisis line.
envVars.description: Region-appropriate crisis resources surfaced when crisis indicators are detected.
